---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

<div class="site-poster">

{{< include _last-compiled.html >}}

<div class="red-word" aria-hidden="true">MODI</div>

<div class="main-text">I’m a fourth-year undergraduate student at Cornell University majoring in computer science.
My main interests are in programming languages, systems, and formal methods.<br><br>
I also enjoy game theory and computational approaches to music.</div>

<div class="collage-layer" data-collage-layer aria-hidden="true"></div>
<script src="collage.js"></script>

<div class="modi-blue-overlays" aria-hidden="true">
<div class="letter-window letter-window-1"></div>
<div class="letter-window letter-window-2"></div>
<div class="letter-window letter-window-3"></div>
<div class="letter-window letter-window-4"></div>
</div>

<nav class="footer-links" aria-label="Footer links">
<a href="mailto:modigr4@gmail.com">modigr4@gmail.com</a>
<a href="blog.html">Blog</a>
<a href="credits.html">Credits</a>
</nav>

</div>
